d1.title: Paris Guide
d1.text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.

d2.title: London Info
d2.text: London is the capital of England and the United Kingdom.

d3.title: Steak Recipe
d3.text: To cook a perfect steak, use a cast iron skillet and plenty of butter.

d4.title: Vegetable Soup
d4.text: This soup is made with carrots, celery, and onions.

d5.title: France Trivia
d5.text: France is a country in Western Europe.
